register.termsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
register.termsSuffix: My preferences will be used exclusively to generate personalized recommendations.

recommendations.subtitle: What are you watching today?
recommendations.label: Extra context
recommendations.placeholder: E.g.: something light for tonight, a tense thriller...
recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.moodLabel: Your day already has too many decisions. Finding something to watch doesn't need to be another one. Tell me how your day went — and I'll find the perfect film for you.
recommendations.moodPlaceholder: Keep it simple: "tired", "excited", "need a good cry", "want to laugh"...
recommendations.incompleteTitle: Complete your profile to get started
recommendations.incompleteSubtitle: To find the perfect film for you, I need to know your taste. Takes less than 2 minutes.

profile.title: Cinema Preferences
profile.subtitle: Personalise your recommendations by telling us what you love about cinema

country.title: Your Country
country.subtitle: We filter recommendations available in your local catalogue

genres.subtitle: Select the genres you enjoy most

forgotPassword.title: Recover password

forgotPassword.sentMessage: If this email is registered, you'll receive the link shortly.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Create a strong password for your account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.
resetPassword.invalidMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Could not reset password. Please try again.

verifyEmail.successMessage: Your account has been activated. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorMessage: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new confirmation email.
